LOOKS RARE

we are a decentral artist organisation enabling professional artists releasing artworks as NFTs,
while creating software and experiences in virtual worlds and real exhibitions together.
We are giving artists new income streams through digital channels and educate on blockchain topics.

Follow us on TwitterCommunity on discord

Want to join us?

We are an open group of artists. Send us some of your work, we will be in touch soon!

    Expand/Close
  • What is looks-rare?

    Looks-Rare is a decentral artist organization. We empower each other on technology and marketing and collaborate on special collections. We want unique blockchain art and we want if from all of us for the whole world.

  • Where can I see more?

    check out the Twitter / Instagram pages of our artists, check out @thislooksrare on twitter, we have online showrooms and link all our output in the discord

  • How can I get involved?

    Just join the discord server and ask for a chat :) If you're an artist, scroll up, there is a link to a google formular to apply :)

  • When Mint?

    We constantly mint. Check out our discord for further details or our "upcoming" section where we will announce further drops of our artists
